campaignName: Less Is More — The Essentials Edit
campaignMessage: Three steps. Real ingredients. Visible results.

products.name: The Gentle Cleanser
products.description: pH-balanced gel cleanser with green tea extract and aloe. Frosted glass pump bottle, sage green label with clean sans-serif typography.
products.heroImagePrompt: Professional product photography of a frosted glass pump bottle with sage green minimalist label, gel texture droplet on white surface, soft botanical shadow overlay, clean spa-like environment, luxury skincare advertising, high resolution, photorealistic

products.name: The Daily Serum
products.description: Lightweight hyaluronic acid and niacinamide serum. Amber glass dropper bottle, warm sand-colored label. Fragrance-free, suitable for sensitive skin.
products.heroImagePrompt: Professional product photography of an amber glass dropper bottle with warm sand-colored label, golden serum drop suspended from dropper tip, soft morning light, neutral linen background, premium skincare advertising, high resolution, photorealistic

products.name: The Barrier Cream
products.description: Rich ceramide moisturizer for skin barrier repair. Matte white jar with soft blush accent stripe. Dermatologist-tested, no parabens.
products.heroImagePrompt: Professional product photography of a minimalist matte white cream jar with soft blush pink accent stripe, swirl of thick cream next to jar, clean white surface, soft diffused lighting, dermatologist skincare advertising, high resolution, photorealistic
